standard.method: Manual stem-choice-rationale review followed by cross-check against each item’s cited editorial source record.
standard.keyBalanceProtection: The supported choice is moved into the existing keyed position, preserving answer-position balance and practice-bank structure.
standard.limitation: This is an editorial answer-key consistency repair, not psychometric calibration or independent licensed-psychologist validation.

items.supportedChoice: Beginning with prolonged exposure to a highly feared stimulus rather than moving up a hierarchy gradually
items.displacedChoice: Beginning with prolonged exposure to a highly feared stimulus rather than moving up a hierarchy gradually

items.supportedChoice: Selectively enhances processing within a limited spatial region
items.displacedChoice: Selectively enhances processing within a limited spatial region

items.supportedChoice: Help clients describe concrete signs that the preferred future has occurred
items.displacedChoice: Help clients describe concrete signs that the preferred future has occurred

items.supportedChoice: Adaptive information and action tendencies that can also become maladaptive
items.displacedChoice: Adaptive information and action tendencies that can also become maladaptive

items.supportedChoice: Maintain impartiality and focus on the child’s psychological best interests
items.displacedChoice: Maintain impartiality and focus on the child’s psychological best interests

items.supportedChoice: People with the condition who test positive
items.displacedChoice: People with the condition who test positive

items.supportedChoice: Thoughts, emotions, behavior, physiology, and context interact and can be changed
items.displacedChoice: Thoughts, emotions, behavior, physiology, and context interact and can be changed

items.supportedChoice: Avoid or minimize reasonably foreseeable harm where possible
items.displacedChoice: Avoid or minimize reasonably foreseeable harm where possible

items.supportedChoice: Lifelong self-reflection, power awareness, and accountable partnership
items.displacedChoice: Lifelong self-reflection, power awareness, and accountable partnership

items.supportedChoice: Develop self-awareness, seek relevant knowledge, adapt responsively, and consult when needed
items.displacedChoice: Develop self-awareness, seek relevant knowledge, adapt responsively, and consult when needed
